    Method
    Description
    private static boolean
    HazopScenarioRunner.matchesNode(HazopConsequenceFinding finding, String nodeTag)
    Test whether a finding matches the requested node filter, comparing both the unit name and the node-id fragment.

    HazopScenarioRunner.toMap(HazopConsequenceFinding finding)
    Convert a finding to an insertion-ordered map for stable JSON serialisation.

    Description
    private HazopConsequenceFinding
    HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator.evaluateAutoRefrigeration(String nodeId, ProcessEquipmentInterface unit, String name, HazopQuantificationLimits limits)
    Evaluate the LESS TEMPERATURE consequence for a valve: Joule-Thomson auto-refrigeration below the MDMT.
    private HazopConsequenceFinding
    HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator.evaluateDischargeTemperature(String nodeId, ProcessEquipmentInterface unit, String name, HazopQuantificationLimits limits)
    Evaluate the MORE TEMPERATURE consequence for a compressor or expander: discharge over-temperature.

    HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator.quantify(ProcessSystem process, HazopQuantificationLimits limits)
